page_content:
HESP415 Principles and Methods in Speech-Language Pathology (2 Credits) The principles and methods required to provide treatment of speech and language disorders to children and adults. Topics include writing goals and objectives, programming,teaching strategies,session design, data collection, behavior modiﬁcation and counseling. Prerequisite: HESP400. Restriction: Must be in Hearing and Speech Sciences program.

HESP416 Principles and Methods in Audiology (2 Credits) Relate previous knowledge of anatomy/physiology and pathologies of the auditory system and integrate this information into clinical application. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in HESP411. Restriction: Must be in Hearing and Speech Sciences program; and permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department.
